---
title: "Decision Matrix"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
🇫🇷 [Version française](../testing-matrix.qmd)
:::

## What to test based on the change

| Change | Minimal test | Full test |
|--------|-------------|-----------|
| New Nextflow process | `nf-test` happy path + empty file | snapshot + business assertions |
| Modified Bash script | bats exit code + stdout | all edge cases |
| Modified Python function | pytest assertions | bounds + errors |
| Modified R function | testthat columns + values | empty data.frame + large inputs |
| Updated container | bats `--version` | nf-test `--profile apptainer` |
| Bug fixed | test that reproduces the bug | non-regression snapshot |

---

## Expected coverage per tool

### bats (Bash)

- exit code 0 on valid input
- exit code ≠ 0 on invalid input
- error message on stderr/stdout
- output file generated

### pytest (Python)

- pure functions: expected values
- parsing: columns, types, shape
- bounds: negative, empty, extreme values
- errors: `pytest.raises(ValueError)` etc.

### testthat (R)

- result structure: `expect_s3_class`, `expect_named`
- computed values: `expect_equal`
- invariants: `expect_true(all(x >= 0))`
- errors: `expect_error`

### nf-test (Nextflow)

- isolated process: input/output, exit status
- workflow: chaining, step outputs
- full pipeline: end-to-end, files in `outdir`
- snapshot: non-regression

### bats + Apptainer (containers)

- image present (`-f image.sif`)
- tool accessible: `apptainer exec image.sif tool --version`
- tool path: `which tool` → `/usr/` or `/opt/`
- without `$HOME`: `apptainer exec --no-home image.sif tool --version`

---

## Execution frequency

| Test | Frequency | Trigger |
|------|-----------|---------|
| pytest, bats, testthat | every PR | automatic CI |
| nf-test process/workflow | every PR | automatic CI |
| nf-test full pipeline | every PR | automatic CI |
| Container tests | on demand | `workflow_dispatch` CI |
| Quarto render | every push to main | deployment CI |

---

## Testing priorities

```
1 — always test
    critical transformations, filters, business decisions

2 — test as soon as possible
    module chains, workflows

3 — test progressively
    full pipeline, containers, golden dataset

4 — if custom container
    pinned tool version, Apptainer behaviour
```

---

## Progressive maturity

```
Level 0  no tests
Level 1  smoke test (exit 0, file produced)
Level 2  unit tests for scripts + behavioural assertions
Level 3  functional pipeline test on mini-data
Level 4  golden dataset + non-regression tests
Level 5  versioned critical containers + documented handover
```

Do not aim for level 5 from the first sprint. A minimal test on the critical path > zero tests.
